paths.@/lib/common/llm/expect-complete: Domain code must NOT unwrap an LlmOutcome. expectComplete() destroys route/reason/signals, which makes the calling function uncomposable: nobody downstream can retry it, chunk it, batch it, or account for its token cost. RETURN the LlmOutcome and let the boundary (a server action, a route handler, a script) decide. The LlmOutcome type itself is fine to import — it lives in ./llm-outcome.
